title: RaftPack
description: The Official Raft Mod Pack used in Elite Eric's 100 Days Raft Video
body:
⭐ For the best experience we recommend using Elite Eric's custom made Raft Pack World!


# **Features**
- Small Ships
- Naturalist + Spawn
- Create
- Botany Pots + Botany Trees
- Compost & Early Stage
- Fabric Seasons
- Hardcore Revival
- Hybrid Aquatic
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Ambient Sounds
- Dehydration
- Hardcore Revival
- Mob Varients
- Custom Made World

![Raft Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2b56f4b1d3f58c3183cc5123c94baa6f9eea936.jpeg)

⭐ If you're interested in getting the **FULL** experience please visit the [Raft Block](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/raftblock) website to get access to the data pack we used in the video!

⭐ If you enjoyed this modpack, then make sure to check out my other modpack ["All Of Nature"](https://modrinth.com/modpack/allofnature)!!
